title: PED Tweaks
body:
# About:
- Why would someone want to use this datapack? To have fun of course. With my datapack I aim to make your time more enjoyable (time effective even), by adding quality of life changes to the base game and to some of it's mods. (Made for a [modpack](https://modrinth.com/project/FpW2JKI1) I made.)
- Datapack can be used on it's own or with mods (contains modded crafting recipe)

  ## The datapack adds:
  - Extra crafting recepies for base game items and modded items
  - Custome music for Immersive Melodies
  - Loot tables for mobs that don't have one
  - Quality of life features using mcfunctions

# Crafting:
## Some of the included new recepies:
  - Banner pattern "globe" and "snout"
  - Bell
  - Chainmail armor:
  - Crying obsidian
  - Dead bush
  - Horse armors
  - Saddles
  - Trident
  - XP bottle

    ![Recipe for bell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8663b7a869fdfaf6edb32a3893b4779c57972708.png)
    ![Recipe for chainmail chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6654136d5c965bc031644dea63a22a774019d97a.png)
    ![Recipe for iron horse armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49bddf7008f5b545754912bf3311b1aeec9f272a.png)

    ![Recipe for saddle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e31f6dc608f5243c3b60bf3c459f029c48543b15.png)
    ![Recipe for trident](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12349cfc8d837badd655f03009deee15664d5660.png)
    ![Recipe for bottle o' enchanting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/909caca9e7e0ecc67250abad105b67390e41a38e.png)

## Changed recepies:
  - Brewing stand
  - Chain
  - Lodestone
  - Ender eye

    ![Changed brewing stand recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c83c5079dbf2af9c5517aba4e07d8457794fb0a.png)
![Changed ender eye recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c41df5622311a531337e20518c1354fc0c35801.png)


## Modded recepies:
- Wither skeleton skull from skeleton skull using haunting ([Create](https://modrinth.com/project/LNytGWDc))

    ![Wither skeleton skull from skeleton skull](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83008d43b093cacde3e3bc8c0fd65accc8e4ad02.png)

- Replaced copper can recipe from [Create](https://modrinth.com/project/LNytGWDc), so it does not conflict with [Tinkers' Construct](https://modrinth.com/project/rxIIYO6c)

    ![Changed copper can recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03d06f4af6be70c12cec7c9ead2f63b4fb3604de.png)

# Loot tables:
## Gameplay loot tables
  - Sniffer digging items
    - Can dig up any kind of seed from base game
## Entity loot tables
  - Allay
    - Can drop music disc when killed
  - Axolotl
    - Can drop sponge, prismarine shards, fish
  - Bat
    - Can drop rabbit hide
  - Camel
    - Can drop yellow wool
  - Cat
    - Can drop salmon
  - Endermite
    - Can drop ender pearl
  - Frog
    - Can drop slime ball, magma cream
  - Goat
    - Can drop leather, wool, goat horn
  - Silverfish
    - Can drop flint, gravel, spider eye
  - Sniffer
    - Can drop moss block, moss carpet, azalea
  - Turtle
    - Can drop scute, turtle egg, 
  - Warden
    - Can drop sculk catalyst, sculk, sculk vein, sculk sensor
# Quality of life features:
  - ("Quality of life features" can be configured using /trigger ped_config)
  - Soups and stew restore all of your hunger and give extra effects
  - Goat horns give potion effects to players and their allies
  - If more than 400 floating items exist, they get killed (players are warned at 150, 200 and 300 items)
  - Players get speed 1 while on conrete, dirt path or (if you are using it in my [modpack](https://modrinth.com/project/FpW2JKI1)) on concrete from [Clayworks](https://modrinth.com/project/1iicrEO3) or on any path blocks from [Decorative Paths](https://modrinth.com/project/ep4qLPDu)
  - Ghasts will not sink into lava
  - Items associated with the nether won't burn in lava
  - Arrows can be moved to a quiver (score), and can be drawn from if the player has an arrow in their inventory
  - Player sleep percentage can be changed with a trigger score (from 0=100% to 4=1%)
  - Blocks that look like they would damage entities now damage them (campfire, stonecutter)
  - XP won't be dropped by players uppon death and will be given on respawn
  - Smokers and blast furnaces produce (more) smoke particles
